title: Fix release preparation identity validation
outOfScope: Changing public release tags or executing the release workflow.

sources.reason: The preparation-mode selector that incorrectly uses the next candidate as the current public release identity.
Existing release distribution regression suite and new failing reproduction.
Defines the release-preparation validation context used by CI.

riskAssessment.reason: The CI failure identifies a deterministic preparation-mode identity selection bug.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized serial PR remediation and the failing CI evidence is deterministic.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Preparation mode validates release.json as the pending public release identity.
next-release.json remains independently validated as the subsequent candidate.
A regression test fails before the fix and passes after it, while existing quality checks remain green.
guidelines: Keep release identity validation fail-closed and evidence-bound.
Do not claim publication success from preparation-mode validation alone.

intent.problem: CI rejects the release promotion because preparation mode treats next-release.json v0.5.34 as the current public identity, even though release.json v0.5.33 is the pending release and public v0.5.32 is still highest.
constraints: Change only release-preparation identity selection and its regression coverage.
Preserve formal release workflow authority and do not create tags or releases in this Work Item.
intent.rationale: Preparation must validate the pending release against the current public tag, then validate the next candidate separately.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Preparation validates the pending release before the public tag is created.
evidence: Regression test exercises v0.5.33 pending against public v0.5.32 while next candidate is v0.5.34.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Normal release distribution validation remains unchanged.
evidence: Existing release distribution tests and full project quality suite.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized automatic serial PR remediation and branch cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
